name: The Following Events are Based on a Pack of Lies
original_name: The Following Events are Based on a Pack of Lies
overview: Two very different women, Alice a formidable PA and Cheryl a best-selling fantasy author, become trapped in a triangle of epic proportions with Rob an eccentric and celebrated 'ecopreneur' who may or may not be trying to destroy them both.

trailers.title: The Following Events Are Based on a Pack of Lies | Trailer - BBC
